recurring_failure_modes.description: Extract recurring failure patterns or root-cause themes explicitly called out (e.g., 'timeout in parser', 'schema mismatch', 'rate limiting'). Return an array of concise strings, one per failure mode, using the document’s wording where possible.

recommended_actions.description: Extract the recommended next steps or remediation actions listed in the report. Return an array of action strings; include any stated owner/team and timeframe in the same string if present (e.g., 'Add retry w/ backoff for API calls — Owner: Platform — ETA: 2w').
